description: Google Cloud Datastream is a managed change data capture and replication service for streaming data from databases into Google Cloud destinations such as BigQuery, Cloud Storage, Cloud SQL, and Spanner.
summary: Datastream exposes a REST API at `https://datastream.googleapis.com/v1` and an MCP server at `https://datastream.googleapis.com/mcp`; the MCP endpoint is publicly reachable without credentials, while the REST API auth mechanics were not confirmed from the pages read.
